ticket.subject: Unexpected $349 charge on May invoice - plan should be $99/month
ticket.body: I'm seeing a $349 charge on my May statement, but our account is subscribed to the Pro plan at $99 per month. Looking at the itemized invoice, there are charges I didn't authorize: 'Premium support addon $75', 'API rate limit increase $150', and 'Data retention extension $25'. We haven't made any plan modifications or requested these services. Can you investigate why these were added and process a refund for the unauthorized charges?
